description.content:
The ADT+ Platform API provides programmatic access to ADT's smart home security platform for managing security systems, devices, sensors, cameras, locks, and automation rules. Supports remote arming/disarming, real-time device status monitoring, video clip retrieval, access code management, and security event notifications for residential and small business ADT customers.

Contact Support:
 Name: ADT Customer Support
